faqs.question: How do I register for courses?
faqs.answer: Log in to the student portal, navigate to the registration tab, select your courses for the semester, and click submit for advisor approval.

faqs.question: What are the requirements for new students?
faqs.answer: New students need their JAMB admission letter, O-level results, birth certificate, and proof of state of origin for physical screening.

faqs.question: Where is the University Library located?
faqs.answer: The Main Library is located at the center of the campus, adjacent to the Senate Building.

faqs.question: Yaya ake yin rajistar kwas?
faqs.answer: Shiga cikin shafin dalibai (portal), sannan ka je bangaren rajista, ka zabi kwasashenda za ka yi a wannan zangon karatu, sannan ka danna 'submit' domin amincewar mai ba ka shawara (advisor).

faqs.question: Mene ne bukatun sabbin dalibai?
faqs.answer: Sabbin dalibai suna bukatar wasikar shiga makaranta ta JAMB, sakamakon O-level, takardar haifuwa, da shaida daga jihar su domin tantancewa.

faqs.question: كيف يمكنني التسجيل في الدورات؟
faqs.answer: سجل الدخول إلى بوابة الطالب، وانتقل إلى علامة تبويب التسجيل، واختر مقرراتك الدراسية للفصل الدراسي، ثم انقر فوق إرسال لموافقة المستشار.

academicInfo.title: Tsarin Maki (Grading)
academicInfo.content: FUDMA tana amfani da ma'aunin CGPA 5.0. 'A' ita ce 5.0 (daga maki 70-100), yayin da 'F' ita ce 0.0 (daga maki 0-39).
